title: Camoperata
description: A camera mod that allows custom images to be uploaded or recorded ingame live!
body:
Camoperata is a mod that simply allows you to take detailed photo's ingame, using your own shaders and texture packs, clientsided models like Figura, Anything you can see on your game, you can take a picture of!

This is possible via disabling the hud/hands, then taking a screenshot, then attempting to upload to the server!

There's also a command [manualupload] that allows you to upload a png to server, by typing in the file name [auto removes .png, dont have to include that!] as long as the file is in your local cache [game run folder\screenshots\camera]

There is also gamerules for the server to control safety [IE, width/height of image, file size, allowing exact duplicate photo's, and allowing downscaling within a multiplier of the erroring value [scale/file size], which if over multiplier, will attempt to auto downscale the photo]

There is also integrated, dynamic downscaling of photo's too large, Please Enjoy that!

Finally, the photo's are stored in the world on serverside, then they are requested by client, sent to client, then stored in the client's local cache, and rendered dynamically, you can watch it delete them live if you try on singleplayer!

Please enjoy my modification, with love, AshleyKarmic <3
